Babar Azam & Steve Smith: 1 Major BBL Feud Settled

Jan 22, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Babar Azam & Steve Smith: 1 Major BBL Feud Settled

Babar Azam was at the center of a significant sporting discussion recently following a heated exchange during a Big Bash League fixture. The tension, which initially appeared to be a standard on-field disagreement, has now been clarified by those closest to the situation.

Recent reports regarding the Steve Smith controversy suggest that what fans witnessed on television was merely the tip of the iceberg, involving days of internal dialogue to resolve a deep-seated cultural misunderstanding between two of the world’s greatest modern batsmen.
